mapper.select: select count(*) from albums where is_public = true
mapper.sql: select a.*, coalesce(p.photo_count, 0) as photo_count from albums a left join ( select album_id, count(*) as photo_count from album_photos where is_public = true group by album_id ) p on p.album_id = a.id
mapper.select: select a.*, coalesce(p.photo_count, 0) as photo_count from albums a left join ( select album_id, count(*) as photo_count from album_photos where is_public = true group by album_id ) p on p.album_id = a.id where a.is_public = true order by a.sort_order asc, a.created_at desc, a.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select * from albums where slug = #{slug} and is_public = true

select a.*, coalesce(p.photo_count, 0) as photo_count from albums a left join ( select album_id, count(*) as photo_count from album_photos group by album_id ) p on p.album_id = a.id
order by a.sort_order asc, a.created_at desc, a.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into albums (title, slug, description, cover_url, sort_order, is_public) values (#{title}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{coverUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{isPublic})
mapper.update: update albums set title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_public = #{isPublic}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from album_photos where album_id = #{albumId} and is_public = true order by sort_order asc, created_at asc, id asc
select * from album_photos where album_id = #{albumId} and id = #{photoId}
mapper.insert: insert into album_photos (album_id, file_id, image_url, title, description, sort_order, is_public, taken_at) values (#{albumId}, #{fileId}, #{imageUrl}, #{title}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{isPublic}, #{takenAt})
mapper.update: update album_photos set file_id = #{fileId}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_public = #{isPublic}, taken_at = #{takenAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{photoId} and album_id = #{albumId}
mapper.delete: delete from album_photos where id = #{photoId} and album_id = #{albumId}
